acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Mill Valley CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
overview: The Mill Valley Police Department employs Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence while maintaining individual privacy. The Department uses retroactive searches to aid in solving crimes after they occur and leverages real-time alerts for hotlisted vehicles to help apprehend wanted individuals. To promote transparency and accountability, the Department has made its policies and usage statistics publicly available.
